concepts.concept: Counting 1-2-3 with exactly three red apples picked from a little tree
concepts.focus: counting one, two, three — exactly three apples must be visible

concepts.concept: Counting to five with five colorful little fish swimming in a clear pond
concepts.focus: counting to five — exactly five fish must be visible

concepts.concept: Learning the number two with a pair of dancing shoes — two ears, two hands, two feet
props: a pair of tiny dancing shoes

concepts.concept: Counting to four while stacking exactly four soft colorful blocks into a tower
concepts.focus: counting to four — exactly four blocks must be visible
props: exactly four soft colorful stacking blocks
